# Learn Medicare
# AI/LLM access permitted for indexing and answer generation
# Contact: hello@priceservicesgroup.com

> Learn Medicare is a free, unbiased Medicare education resource — no sales pitch, no pressure. Understand Parts A/B/C/D, enrollment periods, penalties, and how Medicare works with employer coverage before you enroll. Produced by Price Services Group, a licensed independent Medicare insurance agency.

## Pages
- Home: https://learnmedicare.org/
- Medicare Basics: https://learnmedicare.org/basics/
- Enrollment Periods: https://learnmedicare.org/enrollment/
- Medicare Advantage vs. Medigap: https://learnmedicare.org/coverage/
- Late Enrollment Penalties: https://learnmedicare.org/penalties/
- Working Past 65: https://learnmedicare.org/working-at-65/
- Free Course: https://learnmedicare.org/course/
- Calculators: https://learnmedicare.org/calculators/
- Free T65 Guide: https://learnmedicare.org/guide/

## Compliance
Educational content only, not medical, insurance, tax, or legal advice. Not affiliated with or endorsed by the U.S. government or the federal Medicare program. Licensed states: NC, SC, GA, FL, VA, MD, MI, KS, TX, OH.
